tagline: Shortest walking route over every courtyard of a Hofflohmärkte flyer
step1.title: Load the map PDF
step1.errNoInput: Choose a PDF file or enter a URL.
step1.errTimeout: The request timed out — please try again.
auth.title: Manual calibration access
step2.title: Calibration
step2.intro: Detected market dots are circled in pink, station icons in blue/green. Map at least 3 landmarks: Pick on map → click the landmark → search its real-world position. Use Set map area (two clicks) to exclude legend artwork.
step2.deleteConfirm: Delete the cached calibration for this PDF and reset this session's manual calibration?
th.name: Name
hint.cp: Click the position of control point {n} on the map.
hint.bbox1: Click the top-left corner of the map area.
hint.bbox2: Now click the bottom-right corner of the map area.
step3.title: Compute routes
step3.osrmTip: Checked: route follows actual walking paths along streets (requires internet). Unchecked: straight lines between stops, works offline.
res.title: Results
chip.fitTip: Average GPS positioning error of the map calibration. ~{v} m means each stop is placed within roughly {v} metres of its real-world location.
stat.noGps: route order only (add calibration for distances)
file.dsc.geojson: Raw route data for QGIS and other GIS tools
foot.line2: PDF in, shortest walking tour out.
foot.exports: Exports: PDF · GPX · KML · GeoJSON · Google Maps
